articles.title: BLOCKFI ADMINISTRATOR SUBMITS PLAN IN COURT TO MAKE CUSTOMERS WHOLE
articles.summary: BlockFi is finalizing its bankruptcy distribution, which would make customers and unsecured creditors whole. It was one of the first companies to go bankrupt after the collapse of FTX in November 2022. BlockFi can fully compensate customers partly because its $847 million in claims against FTX was monetized at a substantial premium to face value.

articles.title: SPOT ETHEREUM ETFS BEGIN TRADING TODAY: HERE'S WHAT YOU NEED TO KNOW
articles.summary: Spot ETH ETFs begin trading today in the U.S., with expectations of net inflows ranging from $750M-$1B per month for the first half year. These ETFs will trade on various exchanges and have varying post-waiver fees.

articles.title: EXPLORING CIRCLE STARKS
articles.summary: Circle STARKs are a new way to make blockchain proofs faster and more efficient. They use smaller numbers to optimize speed and a “circle” structure for calculations to overcome security challenges and reduce wasted space in computational traces. Researchers are looking at how to make these proofs more user-friendly for use with operations like hashing or signing.

articles.title: AVAIL DA MAINNET AND TOKEN NOW LIVE
articles.summary: Avail DA is the first modular DA layer that uses proofs and data availability sampling. It already supports integrations with all top L2 chains, RaaS providers, and frameworks. The AVAIL token is used to pay for DA fees and earn staking rewards. Avail also aims to become a permissionless unification layer for web3 through Avail Nexus' cross-chain transaction feature and Avail Fusion's shared security.

articles.title: REPORT ON BITCOIN OWNERSHIP
articles.summary: In a survey of over 3,500 US adults, Bitcoin ownership was found across political identities, ethnicity, income, and education levels. Owners tended toward young and male. People who owned Bitcoin had significantly higher knowledge and trust in it. Overall, Bitcoin owners, who make up 14% of the population, are moderate, average Americans.

articles.title: THE FUTURE OF DEX TRADING - A UNISWAPX CASE STUDY
HOW NOT TO REKT YOUR USERS WITH INCENTIVES ON THE LENDING MARKET
articles.summary: Recently, incentive rewards on Aave created non-organic behavior that resulted in -330% APR for looping borrowers. Fluid, in contrast, is implementing a more sustainable approach by incentivizing ETH lenders rather than borrowers, enabled by its shared pool liquidity and vault system. Its flexible architecture allows more changeable markets to respond sustainably to user behaviors and avoid sudden disruptions.

articles.title: OPTIMISM ABOUT CRYPTO: EMERGING MARKET USE-CASES
COINBASE'S MAGICSPEND
articles.summary: MagicSpend is a new chain abstraction product from Coinbase that allows anyone to spend their Coinbase balance onchain.

articles.title: UNBOUND FUND - THE FIRST GOLDEN VISA ELIGIBLE FUND THAT GIVES YOU EXPOSURE TO BITCOIN
articles.summary: Unbound Fund introduces a novel pathway to Portuguese/EU citizenship through an investment in Bitcoin worth €500K.

articles.title: JOEY KRUG ON FOUNDERS FUND'S $11M INVESTMENT INTRO PUDGY PENGUINS
articles.summary: Founders Fund backs Pudgy Penguins, Igloo Inc, and Abstract Chain due to their unique and profitable user acquisition strategy, which leverages physical retail partnerships with major stores like Walmart and Target.

articles.title: BUNNI LAUNCHES A NEW DECENTRALIZED EXCHANGE
articles.summary: Bunni v2 testnet is live, introducing a new approach to liquidity with automated, customizable, and programmable features for liquidity providers (LPs).
